content: NATS JetStream WorkQueuePolicy = at-least-once delivery, NOT exactly-once. AckExplicit required for pull consumers (each msg acked individually). Redelivery after AckWait or NAK. MaxDeliver caps retries. Message deduplication via Nats-Msg-Id header (default 2-min window) is publish-side only. Exactly-once = publish dedup + double-ack (AckSync). Term stops redelivery without ack. Side effects from redelivered messages must be idempotent at consumer boundary.
